node.title: Messed up Uber Interview dsa round

article.title: Messed up Uber Interview dsa round
article.content: I had my uber interview today for a coding round. I could have solved the problem 9/10 times but completely went frozen and messed it up. It is not an elmination round do I still have a chance. I am having my lld rounds scheduled in the upcoming days but I am hopeless now. I have practiced so hard on dsa and leetcode,feeling down

post.content: what was the que bro? and don\'t lose hope. they may have second dsa round if next rounds go well. one of my senior had same situation and he got second chance for DSA.

Don't give up.
It happens to the best of us.

Don't worry about what has happened, take learnings from it and move on.
All the best !!
What was the question that u messed up bro. All the best for your future.
IG it would impact your overall feedback. Happened to me also. I was not able to solve the DSA round. All other rounds went very well. Didn\'t get any response from HR. 2 months now.
yes you totally do \ntry to do well in SD and HM.
